final_text:
Those are vendored/virtual-env files, not part of the repository's own source. The confirmed call-site files are the 12 `.rs` files (excluding `src/query/index.rs` which only has comments).

```json
["src/index.rs", "src/parser/c_lang.rs", "src/parser/cpp.rs", "src/parser/csharp.rs", "src/parser/go.rs", "src/parser/java.rs", "src/parser/javascript.rs", "src/parser/python.rs", "src/parser/ruby.rs", "src/parser/rust_lang.rs", "src/parser/treesitter.rs", "src/parser/typescript.rs"]
```

input.command: grep -rn "parse_file\s*(" --include="*" . | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "^\s*//" | grep -v "^\s*\*" 2>/dev/null | sed 's|^\./||' | cut -d: -f1 | sort -u

find . -type f \( -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.c" -o -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.rb" -o -name "*.toml" \) | head -5 && ls src/ 2>/dev/null || true

input.command:
for f in src/index.rs src/parser/c_lang.rs src/parser/cpp.rs src/parser/csharp.rs src/parser/go.rs src/parser/java.rs src/parser/javascript.rs src/parser/python.rs src/parser/ruby.rs src/parser/rust_lang.rs src/parser/treesitter.rs src/parser/typescript.rs src/query/index.rs; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  grep -n "parse_file\s*(" "$f" | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "^\s*//"
done
